<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Green square at rows 30-31, cols 8-9
# Let me try moving DOWN to rows 32-33, cols 8-9

print("Moving green square DOWN 2 steps...")
result = action([{'action': 'DOWN'}] * 2)
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"Green square after 2 DOWN: {n['boundary']}")
        break

print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check ASCII
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nLeft panel (rows 28-36, cols 6-22):")
for i in range(28, 36):
    print(f"  {i}: {ascii_lines[i][6:22]}")

# Maybe I need to try clicking on the blue/charcoal pattern
print("\nTrying to click on blue/charcoal pattern (rows 20-23, cols 14-17)...")
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 21, 'col': 15}])
print(f"Board changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

# Check ASCII after click
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nLeft panel (rows 18-45, cols 6-26):")
for i in range(18, 45):
    print(f"  {i}: {ascii_lines[i][6:26]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
